query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM vendas v INNER JOIN tanques t ON v.tanqueId = t.id INNER JOIN postos p ON t.postoId = p.id WHERE p.nome LIKE '%SUPER PETROLEO%' AND dataVenda >= '2026-02-03 00:00:00' AND dataVenda <= '2026-02-04 23:59:59.999';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM vendas v INNER JOIN tanques t ON v.tanqueId = t.id INNER JOIN postos p ON t.postoId = p.id WHERE p.nome LIKE '%SUPER PETROLEO%' AND dataVenda >= '2026-02-03 00:00:00' AND dataVenda <= '2026-02-04 23:59:59.999';
